=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (3:7-3:31) TS6133: '_notExportedNoSuggestion' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (10:14-10:34) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn("shouldHaveSuggestion")(function*(n) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"shouldHaveSuggestion\")"

[D3] (17:17-17:45) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn("shouldHaveSuggestionFunction")(function*(n) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"shouldHaveSuggestionFunction\")"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"shouldHaveSuggestion\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferred.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const _notExportedNoSuggestion = () => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return 42
  })
}

export const shouldHaveSuggestion = Effect.fn("shouldHaveSuggestion")(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export function shouldHaveSuggestionFunction(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"shouldHaveSuggestionFunction\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferred.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const _notExportedNoSuggestion = () => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return 42
  })
}

export const shouldHaveSuggestion = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const shouldHaveSuggestionFunction = Effect.fn("shouldHaveSuggestionFunction")(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});
